moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: Likely broke Wisconsin law by offering $1M to voters to induce them to vote in 2025 Supreme Court election.
moments.why: Men 25‑45 are buzzing over Musk’s legal peril and audacious political stunt, blending billion‑dollar giveaways with election drama.
moments.url: https://apnews.com/article/... likely broke the law by giving voters $1 million, Wisconsin board says

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.why: Altman’s cryptic slang post from yesterday has tech communities speculating and memeing, driving huge engagement.
moments.url: https://www.nationpress.com/... Sam Altman posts cryptic slang on X

moments.author: Donald Trump
moments.quote: It’s going to be a very big announcement… really, REALLY BIG news
moments.why: Trump’s hype for his July 16 primetime speech ignited heated conversation around election integrity among politically minded guys.
moments.url: https://www.forbes.com/... Trump teases ‘really, really big news’ in Thursday’s primetime speech
